objective: Prove the deployed public LifeMax aliases expose the browser-local experiment decision to Today plan handoff without claiming backend or medical automation readiness.
productionApproval: PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote was explicitly provided earlier in this goal thread.
smokeFlow: Open Profile and reset browser-local demo data.
Open Today and save manual check-in.
Open Capture and save one helped habit capture.
Open Experiments and start the local experiment.
Save a Keep decision with a note.
Click Use decision in Today plan.
Open Today and verify the derived plan.
Open Privacy and verify the WHOOP/backend boundary copy.
Verify 390px client width equals scroll width.

results.label: omega
resultPanelContains: Experiment decision moved into Today's browser-local plan.
This replaces the browser-local Today plan, clears any active focus block, and resets plan items to open.
planAfterReload: Repeat kept part: protect first useful block
Close the loop without adding another rule
Do not scale beyond one block

verificationCommands.result: pass: lifemax-web production deployment dpl_GhNpCugqjyDQ4zjCRA9YyDHQxkv4 Ready and aliased to lifemax-web.vercel.app
pass: both aliases completed experiment decision to Today plan handoff, reload persistence, Privacy boundary, no console errors, and no 390px horizontal overflow

residualRisks: Vercel install reported 2 moderate npm audit vulnerabilities; no dependency upgrades were performed in this goal slice.
This proves browser-local production behavior only, not backend/shared-context readiness.
No WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, backend writes, reminders, timers, or cross-device sync are connected or proven.
LifeMax lab/control-plane boot and preflight remain red from this continuation's initial inspection.
completionDecision: checkpoint, not complete: deployed browser-local function is proven on both public aliases and independent verifier accepted checkpoint status; full LifeMax readiness remains false.

independentVerification.summary: Verifier accepted the experiment-plan handoff as a bounded public checkpoint and rejected complete because broader LifeMax readiness remains unproved.
